name: ACSES Academy
tagline: YouTube-based courses, organized as a real curriculum.
description: ACSES Academy is a content-first learning product. It uses YouTube hosting for speed and cost-efficiency, while the platform structure (catalog → course → lesson) is designed to scale into a full LMS when needed.
highlights: Course catalog driven by JSON (easy updates, deploy-friendly)
Lesson pages with privacy-friendly YouTube embed (nocookie)
Clear upgrade path to auth, progress tracking, and payments

roadmap.title: v1 (now)
roadmap.desc: Catalog + course pages + lesson embeds + SEO basics.

roadmap.title: v1.5
roadmap.desc: Search, tags, filtering, better course landing pages.

name: ACSES University
description: ACSES University is designed for long-form depth: structured tracks, milestones, assessments, and portfolio outcomes. It starts as a program framework and grows into a full platform once operations and content scale.
highlights: Program tracks (Beginner → Advanced) with measurable milestones

roadmap.title: Design phase
roadmap.desc: Define tracks, modules, outcomes, and standards.

roadmap.title: Pilot
roadmap.desc: Launch 1 program with a limited cohort.
